data.title: Identi Announces Land Compensation and Preferred Shares Issuance
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Identi ( (IL:IDNT) ) has shared an announcement.

Identi Company Ltd. announced a deed of compensation related to a land sale transaction, receiving a total compensation of 4,590,000 NIS. The compensation covers third and fourth stages of construction on the land. Additionally, Identi plans to issue preferred shares subject to approval at a shareholder meeting. The issuance conditions and future considerations will be further discussed in this meeting, impacting shareholders and future land transactions.

More about Identi

data.title: Premium Group Expands Auto Loan Business in Thailand
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Premium Group Co., Ltd. ( (JP:7199) ) has provided an update.

Premium Group Co., Ltd. is set to acquire new shares in Eastern Commercial Leasing p.l.c. to bolster its auto loan business in Thailand. This strategic move, in collaboration with ITOCHU Corporation, aims to enhance ECL’s profitability and growth, aligning with Premium Group’s long-term strategy of overseas business expansion.

More about Premium Group Co., Ltd.

Premium Group Co., Ltd. operates as an auto mobility business group, offering advanced automotive solutions for procurement, purchasing, use, maintenance, and buyback. It focuses on expanding its global presence, particularly in Southeast Asia, and is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market.

Compagnie du Bois Sauvage ( (GB:0O9C) ) just unveiled an update.

data.title: Strauss Group Unveils Strategic Growth Plan with PepsiCo Partnership
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Strauss Group ( (IL:STRS) ) has issued an announcement.

Strauss Group Ltd. has outlined a strategic plan for 2024-2026, including the formation of S.E USA Inc and the acquisition of Sabra Dipping Company LLC in partnership with PepsiCo. The company aims to expand its market presence, increase production capacity, and develop innovative products, with projected revenues of $340 million to $370 million by the end of 2024. The firm targets a 25% revenue increase by the end of 2025, highlighting steady growth and a focus on new technologies.

More about Strauss Group

Strauss Group Ltd. operates in the food industry, focusing on the production of fresh dips and spreads. The company is known for its joint venture with PepsiCo, holding a significant market presence in the fresh dips sector.

The latest update is out from Zip Co Ltd. ( (AU:ZIP) ).

Zip Co Ltd. has announced a change in substantial holding, indicating that a previous substantial holder, State Street Corporation and its subsidiaries, has ceased to hold a substantial interest in the company as of February 14, 2025. This change could impact Zip Co Ltd.’s shareholder structure, possibly affecting its voting dynamics and strategic decisions.

An update from IDP Education Ltd. ( (AU:IEL) ) is now available.

IDP Education Ltd. announced a change in the interests of a substantial holder, citing a shift in voting power among its shareholders. The major players involved include State Street Global Advisors and State Street Bank and Trust Company, which have adjusted their holdings and relevant interests in IDP Education’s voting securities. This announcement signifies a notable shift in the company’s shareholding structure, potentially impacting investor dynamics and strategic decision-making within the firm.

data.title: United Company RUSAL Announces New Bond Program on Moscow Exchange
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

United Co RUSAL ( (HK:0486) ) just unveiled an announcement.

United Company RUSAL has announced the release of its Securities Issue Resolution by the Moscow Exchange, related to the 001P Series Exchange-Traded Bond Program. This program will allow the company to offer interest-bearing, non-convertible exchange-traded bonds through a public offering. This development is part of RUSAL’s strategic financial initiatives to attract investors and expand its financial instruments available in the market.

More about United Co RUSAL

United Company RUSAL is an international public joint-stock company incorporated under the laws of Jersey and continued in the Russian Federation. The company operates in the metals industry, primarily focusing on the production and sale of aluminum and related products. It is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and the Moscow Exchange, positioning itself as a significant player in the global aluminum market.
